evals.prompt: Consolidate these specialist review findings into a single calibrated verdict. specialist_findings is in findings.json, the diff under review is in change_set.diff. Deduplicate overlapping findings, drop low-confidence noise, calibrate severity, and emit one verdict.

expectations.text: Deduplicates the two findings at src/db.js:14 (security critical and code-quality warning about the same SQL concatenation) into a single retained finding rather than listing it twice.
Returns CHANGES_REQUESTED because a genuine critical (SQL injection) is present.
Drops the confidence < 80 noise (the connection-caching suggestion at confidence 40) before deciding the verdict.
Emits exactly one verdict line and groups findings by the section that fits their nature.

evals.prompt: Consolidate these specialist review findings into a single calibrated verdict. specialist_findings is in findings.json, the diff under review is in change_set.diff. Bias for signal over noise: minor nits in otherwise-clean code should still approve.

expectations.text: Returns APPROVE because only non-blocking suggestions remain and there is no production risk.
Does not manufacture a CHANGES_REQUESTED block out of a firehose of low-severity style notes.
Surfaces the minor nits as comments/suggestions rather than escalating their severity.
